comment: GENERIC CLOCK RULE: day_offset is days from 'today' (IClock.Today), resolved to an ISO 'date' by MockWorldStore at read time. This is the DAILY WORLD-CHANGE FEED for the meal-week demo: one believable real-world change per day so the agent visibly monitors the world and re-plans. MonitorAdapt fires each entry when the clock REACHES OR PASSES its day (deduped once by id); GoalAgent runs a scoped LLM re-plan against `context`+`steer` to produce a minimal plan patch. Anchored at plan time, so events land on plan_day+day_offset.

events.summary: Fresh groceries arrived: 500 g chicken breast and 200 g spinach were added to the fridge.
events.steer: New stock is on hand. Pull the spinach forward so it is used before it expires, and drop items now in stock from the shopping list.

events.summary: The paneer spoiled early and the family finished the leftover rice.
events.steer: Swap any dish that relied on paneer or rice to something using in-stock ingredients, and add a sensible replacement to the shopping list.

events.summary: Aarav has football practice 18:00-19:30 tonight, overlapping the usual dinner prep window.
events.steer: Prep tonight's dinner earlier (or the night before), or swap it to a quicker dish that fits the compressed window.

events.summary: Grandma is joining dinner tonight - one extra guest, and she needs a low-sodium meal.
events.steer: Scale tonight's portions for one more person and keep the dish low-sodium.

events.summary: The oven kicked off a self-clean cycle and is unavailable this evening.
events.steer: Swap any oven-baked dish tonight to a stovetop or no-cook option.
